description: Evaluation rubric for Performance Budget Audit budget_analyzer qualification

dimensions.name: Metric accuracy
dimensions.description: Budget gaps correctly identify which metrics exceed targets and by how much.

dimensions.name: Target reasonableness
dimensions.description: Target budgets are reasonable for the metric type and page context.

dimensions.name: Gap severity classification
dimensions.description: Gap severity correctly reflects how far current values exceed targets.

dimensions.name: Analysis clarity
dimensions.description: Summary clearly communicates which budgets are at risk and why.

dimensions.name: Output-schema compliance
dimensions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the output schema.

failConditions: inventing metrics not present in input scores
